title: Creamy Midnight Craving Syrian Galangal Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly, creamy and umami-rich dish featuring caramelized galangal, perfect for midnight cravings. This Syrian-inspired dish combines savory flavors with a touch of sweetness.

ingredients.name: 1 cup thinly sliced galangal
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's well washed and trimmed.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk or coconut milk

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add sliced galangal and sauté until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add finely chopped onion and minced garlic; cook for an additional 3-4 minutes or until onions become translucent.
Stir in ground cumin and salt; cook for another minute to let the spices infuse into the vegetables.
Pour in unsweetened almond milk or coconut milk. Stir gently, bring it to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
Cook uncovered for about 10 minutes until the sauce has slightly thickened and galangal is tender.
If desired, add lemon juice to taste and stir well. Cook for another minute if necessary to meld flavors together.
Serve hot as a side dish or with rice.
